Given as GMT in ISO 8601 formatted datetime string: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z. * @param \DateTime $dateCreatedBefore Datetime filter used to consider only Verification Attempts created before this datetime on the summary aggregation. Given as GMT in ISO 8601 formatted datetime string: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z. * @param string $country Filter used to consider only Verification Attempts sent to the specified destination country on the summary aggregation. * @param string $channel Filter Verification Attempts considered on the summary aggregation by communication channel. * @param string $destinationPrefix Filter the Verification Attempts considered on the summary aggregation by Destination prefix. It is the prefix of a phone number in E.164 format. */ public function __construct( string $verifyServiceSid = Values::NONE, ?\DateTime $dateCreatedAfter = null, ?\DateTime $dateCreatedBefore = null, string $country = Values::NONE, string $channel = Values::NONE, string $destinationPrefix = Values::NONE ) { $this->options['verifyServiceSid'] = $verifyServiceSid; $this->options['dateCreatedAfter'] = $dateCreatedAfter; $this->options['dateCreatedBefore'] = $dateCreatedBefore; $this->options['country'] = $country; $this->options['channel'] = $channel; $this->options['destinationPrefix'] = $destinationPrefix; } /** * Filter used to consider only Verification Attempts of the given verify service on the summary aggregation. * * @param string $verifyServiceSid Filter used to consider only Verification Attempts of the given verify service on the summary aggregation. * @return $this Fluent Builder */ public function setVerifyServiceSid(string $verifyServiceSid): self { $this->options['verifyServiceSid'] = $verifyServiceSid; return $this; } /** * Datetime filter used to consider only Verification Attempts created after this datetime on the summary aggregation.
